channel.title: True Wisdom Practitioners Association
channel.description: A welcoming space for all who are drawn to the timeless wisdom of the East. Together, we explore the depths of Buddhist and Chan teachings — cultivating mindful living, plant-based wellness, and a gentle, grounded approach to emotional well-being.

item.title: Welcome to True Wisdom Practitioners Association
item.description: Introducing TWPA — a welcoming space for exploring Buddhist and Chan teachings in Oceania.
